name: Valence v2 Knowledge Engine
description: Triple-based knowledge substrate with topology-derived embeddings for personal memory and reasoning

tools.name: insert_triples
tools.description: Insert one or more triples (subject-predicate-object) with optional source provenance. Use this to store knowledge claims, facts, or relationships between entities.

tools.name: query_triples
tools.description: Query triples by pattern matching. Supports wildcards by omitting subject, predicate, or object filters. Use this to retrieve stored knowledge by structure.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Semantic search for nodes similar to a query node using topology-derived embeddings. Use this to find conceptually related knowledge even without exact matches.

tools.name: neighbors
tools.description: Get k-hop neighborhood of a node - all triples within specified depth. Use this to explore the context and relationships around a concept.

tools.name: sources
tools.description: Get provenance sources for a specific triple. Use this to understand where a piece of knowledge came from and assess its trustworthiness.

tools.name: stats
tools.description: Get current engine statistics (triple count, node count, average weight). Use this to understand the current state and size of the knowledge base.

tools.name: maintain
tools.description: Run maintenance operations: decay weights (reduce importance of old knowledge), evict low-weight triples (clean up noise), and recompute embeddings (update semantic relationships). Use this periodically to keep the knowledge base healthy.
